name: wells1137--github-gem-seeker
description: Search GitHub for battle-tested solutions instead of reinventing the wheel. Use when the user problem is universal enough that open source developers have probably solved it already—especially for: format conversion (video/audio/image/document), media downloading, file manipulation, web scraping/archiving, automation scripts, and CLI tools. Prefer this skill over writing custom code for well-trodden problems.
